content.text:
I mean — is it selfish, though? Like, that's sort of the question I'm trying to figure out first, before I let myself want it too much.

But... okay. There's this place I've been before, in the Cascades. And when I'm there I sleep differently. I don't know how else to say it — I just sleep. And I read. I used to read all the time and I don't anymore, and up there I do. It's the only place I actually do.

Is it okay if I want that? Like, is that a reasonable thing to want?
